name: yeeflow-builder
description: Private Codex plugin for building, validating, testing, and improving Yeeflow applications using Yeeflow-specific skills, including package API automation, WorkspaceID support, YAPK-first application delivery, API result classification, proven YAP/YAPK import-generation fixes, current dashboard generation, data-list schema validation, reference app UI templates, Vendor Onboarding v4.1 hard checks, Advanced Controls learning, runtime proof, and tenant-neutral environment configuration guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Private Yeeflow application-building skills for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Private Codex plugin for planning Yeeflow applications from requirements, generating and validating new .yap packages, learning from exported Yeeflow packages, inspecting and validating .yapk existing-application version packages, applying proven YAP/YAPK import-generation rules, schema-backed YAPK Resource decode guidance, preserving signing/resource proof boundaries, generating current-dashboard shells and Data table bindings, generating forms, lists, dashboards, advanced controls, Pivot Table analytics controls, Collection/Kanban actions, Kanban/Collection/Timeline Dynamic controls, Dynamic Sub List and Print Page patterns, expressions, workflows, document-library patterns, and custom code controls, enforcing reference-app UI templates, Vendor Onboarding v4.1 dashboard/data-list hard checks, data-list system schema rules, KPI Summary-to-temp-variable patterns, and lookup display-field validation, orchestrating runtime tests, validating package materialization, generated data-list seed/add-readiness, action target readiness, approval request-page publish readiness, safely checking read-only Yeeflow directory API connectivity from local environment variables, and managing private plugin releases.
defaultPrompt: Plan a Yeeflow app from these requirements.
Validate this Yeeflow package before runtime testing.
Plan a Yeeflow runtime test pass.
Generate Collection/Kanban item actions with selection and bulk operations.
Run the safe Yeeflow directory API connectivity smoke test.
Update the Yeeflow Builder Plugin release.
What Collection and Kanban actions support is included in v0.5.27?
What package API automation and YAPK-first delivery workflow are included in v0.6.4?
